subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up — I'd be glad to set up a meeting to explore how we might work together.

Here are some available slots on our end:

- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Let me know which works best for you and I'll get a calendar invite sent over.

As for your request for direct contact details (email and phone) for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share that information. That said, I'm happy to help coordinate a senior-level technical discussion once we've had our initial conversation and determined the right people to involve.

Looking forward to it.

Best regards
